chunks.text: Technical Reports - Anant Sahai. Effect of Model Dissimilarity on Learning to Communicate in a Wireless Setting with Limited Information (EECS-2019-129) Caryn Tran, Vignesh Subramanian, Kailas Vodrahalli and Anant Sahai. Deep Networks for Equalization in Communications (EECS-2018-177) Laura Brink. Spectrum Access System: Design and Implementation of the Decision-Feedback Equalizer in Software (EECS-2017-112) Heyi Sun. Spectrum Access System: Comparison of Different Equalizers (EECS-2017-87) Anant Sahai, John Wawrzynek and Felicity Zhao.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of technical reports from 2017 to 2019?
chunks.answer: Reports on wireless communication and equalization.

chunks.text: Spectrum Access System: Design and Implementation of the Decision-Feedback Equalizer in Software (EECS-2017-65) Heyi Sun. GSM Whitespaces: An Opportunity for Rural Cellular Service (EECS-2013-198) Shaddi Hasan, Kurtis Heimerl, Kate Harrison, Kashif Ali, Sean Roberts, Anant Sahai and Eric Brewer. Register everyone: on the whitespace use of wireless microphone channels, channel 37, and the soon-to-be guard bands (EECS-2013-4) Kate Harrison and Anant Sahai.
chunks.question: What topics do the 2013 and 2017 technical reports cover?

chunks.text: A bound for block codes with delayed feedback related to the sphere-packing bound (EECS-2009-61) Harikrishna R Palaiyanur and Anant Sahai. How much white space is there? (EECS-2009-3) Mubaraq Mishra and Anant Sahai. Cognitive Radios for Spectrum Sharing: Technical Appendices (EECS-2008-147) Anant Sahai, Mubaraq Mishra, Rahul Tandra and Kristen Ann Woyach.
chunks.question: What are the 2008-2009 reports about?
chunks.answer: Block codes, whitespace, and cognitive radios.

chunks.text: Extended edition: What is a spectrum hole and what does it take to recognize one? (EECS-2008-110) Rahul Tandra, Mubaraq Mishra and Anant Sahai. The price of certainty: 'waterslide curves' and the gap to capacity (EECS-2008-1) Anant Sahai and Pulkit Grover. The source coding game with a cheating switcher (EECS-2007-155) Harikrishna R Palaiyanur, Cheng Chang and Anant Sahai.
chunks.question: What issues do the 2007-2008 reports address?
chunks.answer: Spectrum holes, capacity gaps, and source coding.

chunks.text: Binary additive channels with individual noise sequences and limited active feedback (EECS-2007-5) Krishnan Eswaran, Anand D. Sarwate, Anant Sahai and Michael Gastpar. An Obstacle Avoidance Algorithm for a Car Pulling Many Trailers with Kingpin Hitching (M94/10) Anant Sahai, M. Secor and L. Bushnell.
chunks.question: What are the subjects of the earliest reports listed?
chunks.answer: Binary channels and obstacle avoidance algorithms.
